summary: Create vendor schema and vendor.blog table. Blocker for wp-20260306-signal-sweep-blog-monitor — vendor.blog does not exist. This DDL must run before the blog seed script.

payload.ddl:
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS vendor;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vendor.blog (
  blog_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  domain TEXT NOT NULL,
  path TEXT NOT NULL,
  blog_name TEXT,
  company_name TEXT,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RSS',
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE (domain, path)
);
payload.rollback:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS vendor.blog;
DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS vendor;
constraints: Idempotent — IF NOT EXISTS on both schema and table
